title: Dynamic Multi-Pair Trading Strategy in Cryptocurrency Markets with Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: This study aims to determine whether the application of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) as a specialized execution overlay can enhance pair trading in highly volatile cryptocurrency markets. Although classical implementations of the strategy have proven successful in traditional equities, they frequently exhibit rigidity and suffer from severe divergence risks when applied to high-variance environments. To address this need, this research introduces novel concepts. To construct a robust system, we developed a hierarchical "Filter-then-Rank" pair selection methodology and a proprietary "Fixed Risk, Adaptive Mean" execution model. The system employs a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent with a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) layer to govern execution decisions within strict deterministic risk management boundaries. Evaluated on 1-hour interval data from the Binance USD-M Futures market, the optimized RL policy achieved an out-of-sample performance that substantially outperformed the heuristic baseline. A stationary circular block bootstrap robustness check confirms that the agent's risk-adjusted outperformance is statistically significant at the 10 percent level. Although falling marginally short of the stricter 5 percent threshold, this result highlights the extreme idiosyncratic variance characteristic of digital assets. Ultimately, this thesis contributes to the quantitative finance literature by introducing a hybrid architecture that combines statistical arbitrage with DRL execution policies. Furthermore, it delivers a novel framework for safe reinforcement learning via deterministic shielding, proving that anchoring a neural policy to statistically robust boundaries successfully mitigates severe divergence risks.
reason_zh: 这篇论文提出了一种结合统计套利（配对交易）和深度强化学习（DRL）的混合架构，用于在波动剧烈的加密货币市场中进行交易。它解决了传统配对交易策略在加密市场中面临的僵化和严重背离风险问题。论文创新性地引入了“Filter-then-Rank”配对选择方法和“Fixed Risk, Adaptive Mean”执行模型，并利用PPO-LSTM智能体在严格的风险管理边界内进行决策。其“确定性屏蔽”的安全强化学习框架对于在加密市场中构建稳健的量化策略具有很高的实践价值。虽然核心贡献更侧重于策略执行和风险管理而非广义的因子构造，但其在加密货币市场中的具体策略设计、回测方法以及对高波动性的处理方式，对于统计学硕士背景的你来说，在构建加密货币量化因子和策略时，提供了非常好的思路和可借鉴的实践经验。
